title: Vanilla Stylized
description: A Vanilla style pvp texturepack but its great for all uses!
body:
![Vanilla Stylized Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6c1e978114032a7c0cb8d2aa6b87fb5dcf64b0e.png)

# Vanilla With A Style!!

Vanilla Stylized is a vanilla style texturepack for Minecraft that is mostly centered around pvp but is great for all uses! 

**Features:**
- Smaller Items
- Low Fire
- Decreased Partilces (No Explosion etc)
- Custom Block Textures
- Custom Item Textures
- And More!

More coming soon!!
